header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Strategic Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing processes grounded in insights, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can drive operational outcomes—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

jd.meta: Autodesk · Proactive Support Operations Specialist · Portland OR / Remote · $76K–$136,730 · Req #25WD93781

changeLog.description: 3 minimal word swaps: 'programs' → 'processes', 'improve people experience' → 'drive operational outcomes', 'systematic' → 'data-driven'
Fixed company name to 'Organization Development Network (ODN) Oregon' (was incorrect 'Transition Projects Inc. (via ODN Oregon)')
Switched Pair A → Pair B: facilitation/planning emphasis replaces completed-results bullets for ops/PM role type
'Program Manager, Enablement' (ops/PM signal) vs base 'Program Enablement Manager'
All 4 bullets swapped to Set F/Ops: cross-functional execution ($115K), end-to-end lifecycle management, process improvement (75%), stakeholder alignment
M&A project moved to bullet 1 — signals cross-functional initiative coordination for ops role
Onboarding bullet: 'Optimized/process analysis' → 'Streamlined/gap analyses' for ops methodology signal
'DEI' → 'Diversity & Inclusion' per Autodesk's preferred framing (content library subtle signals)
'DEI' → 'Diversity & Inclusion' in NextGen bullet for consistency with Autodesk framing
Technical skills swapped to Ops/PM cluster: Project Management (Asana, Airtable) + Knowledge Management (SharePoint, Notion, Google Workspace)
HRCI certification line dropped per Ops/PM playbook rule
